title: Madurkathi Table Mat Set (6 Pieces)
shortDescription: Reed table mats woven in the traditional Midnapore madur style.
description: Six placemats hand-woven from madurkathi reed using the traditional technique from Paschim Medinipur. Naturally cooling to the touch and heat-resistant enough for warm serving dishes. Spot clean with a damp cloth.
